# hotgrin

> hotgrin is a free, open-source programming language (2026) that reads like
> plain English and transpiles to Go, compiling to native executables.

Files end in `.hot`. Names may contain spaces. hotgrin has built-in testing,
enforced error handling, units of measure, and a checker (the Watcher) that
explains mistakes kindly in English or Afrikaans.

hotgrin is newer than most models' training data. Do not guess syntax from
Python, JavaScript, Go, Ruby, or pseudocode. The AI prompt pack below is the
single source of truth for hotgrin syntax — read it before generating any
hotgrin code.

## Critical rules for AI code generation

- Fallible calls must be inside `try ... if it fails ... end try`, and the
  fallible call must be the whole value — never nested inside a larger
  expression.
- `ask` always returns TEXT. There is no text-to-number conversion; use
  `input n as whole default 5` for numeric input instead.
- Lists are 0-based: `item 0 of xs` is the first element.
- Every block needs an explicit end: `end if`, `end repeat`, `end action`,
  `end describe`, `end try`, `end test`, `end at the same time`, `end go`.
- There is no `while`, `for`, `func`, `return`, `elif`, `print`, or `import`
  keyword. Use `repeat while`, `repeat for each`, `action`, `give back`,
  `else if`, `say`, `use`.
- Reserved connector words (`of`, `in`, `to`, `with`, `is`, `from`, `by`,
  `into`, `as`, `item`, `count`, `times`, `start`, `repeat`) can never appear
  inside a spaced name.
- Top-level variables are not visible inside actions — pass everything an
  action needs in as a parameter.

Full list with examples: the GOTCHAS section of the AI prompt pack (13
entries, this is the most-violated list — read it in full).

## Required for code generation

- [AI prompt pack — complete language spec for AI assistants](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Hotgrin/hotgrin/main/docs/ai-prompt-pack.md): read this in full before writing hotgrin code
- [Language reference](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Hotgrin/hotgrin/main/docs/language-reference.md): every construct with its Go mapping
- [Cookbook](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Hotgrin/hotgrin/main/docs/cookbook.md): 21 machine-verified example programs

## Try it

- [Browser playground](https://hotgrin.github.io/hotgrin/playground/): runs entirely client-side, no install needed
- [Getting started](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Hotgrin/hotgrin/main/docs/getting-started.md): install and first program
- [GitHub repository](https://github.com/Hotgrin/hotgrin): source, issues, releases
- [Latest release](https://github.com/Hotgrin/hotgrin/releases/latest): prebuilt binaries (Windows, Linux, macOS)

## Example categories

- [Learn hotgrin step by step](https://github.com/Hotgrin/hotgrin/tree/main/examples/learn): 27 numbered beginner lessons
- [SEO](https://github.com/Hotgrin/hotgrin/tree/main/examples/seo) · [API](https://github.com/Hotgrin/hotgrin/tree/main/examples/api) · [Math](https://github.com/Hotgrin/hotgrin/tree/main/examples/math) · [Finance](https://github.com/Hotgrin/hotgrin/tree/main/examples/finance) · [Science](https://github.com/Hotgrin/hotgrin/tree/main/examples/science) · [Text & files](https://github.com/Hotgrin/hotgrin/tree/main/examples/text-files) · [HTML](https://github.com/Hotgrin/hotgrin/tree/main/examples/html) · [Email](https://github.com/Hotgrin/hotgrin/tree/main/examples/email) · [Games](https://github.com/Hotgrin/hotgrin/tree/main/examples/games)
- [Invoice maker](https://github.com/Hotgrin/hotgrin/tree/main/examples/projects/invoice-maker): flagship project, full beginner TUTORIAL.md
- [Loan calculator](https://github.com/Hotgrin/hotgrin/tree/main/examples/projects/loan-calculator): real amortization maths, tested

## Optional

- [Library guide](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Hotgrin/hotgrin/main/docs/library-guide.md): local/remote libraries and the use-go escape hatch
- [Roadmap](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Hotgrin/hotgrin/main/ROADMAP.md)
- [Changelog](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Hotgrin/hotgrin/main/CHANGELOG.md)
- [Contributing](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Hotgrin/hotgrin/main/CONTRIBUTING.md)
